ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Code for the category of the item */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the item (e.g., ea, kg, lb) */,
  "pack" TEXT /* First pack size (e.g., box, carton) */,
  "pack_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity per first pack */,
  "pack2" TEXT /* Second pack size (e.g., pallet) */,
  "pack2_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity per second pack */,
  "pack3" TEXT /* Third pack size (e.g., container) */,
  "pack3_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity per third pack */,
  "distributed" TEXT /* Indicates if the item is distributed (T for true, F for false) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or special instructions for the item */,
  "item_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the item (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Current status of the item (e.g., available, distributed, damaged) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_category_code FOREIGN KEY ("category_code") REFERENCES categories ("category_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_parent" TEXT /* Parent category code for sub-categories */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the warehouse */,
  "warehouse_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the warehouse */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "inventory_status" TEXT /* Current status of the inventory (e.g., available, allocated, distributed) */,
  "inventory_reserved" INTEGER /* Quantity of items reserved for future distributions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "distribution_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution log */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item distributed */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date the item was distributed */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the distribution */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or special instructions for the distribution */,
  "distribution_status" TEXT /* Status of the distribution (e.g., pending, in transit, delivered) */,
  "distribution_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the distribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_distribution_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., warehouse manager, distribution coordinator, field worker) */,
  "user_role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  "user_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view inventory) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the user accessed the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_changes" TEXT /* Changes made in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_versions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_comments_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)
